acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Regression tests cover dirty and unreadable Git state.
Regression test plus live restart preserved game-api-84 at two commits ahead of upstream.
Redacted full-diff workspace.checkpointed events are critical and immediately flushed.
Per-run exponential backoff with jitter is bounded from 2s to 300s.
9,748 receipts compacted to 17 watermarks; legacy telemetry has aggregate retention.
State API distinguishes cached, uncached, output and reasoning tokens; live reuse measured ~92.8%.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Test teardown does not leak OS children
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Repeated restart test leaves no matching FIFO shell processes.

checks.name: make all
checks.summary: 281 tests, 0 failures, 2 skipped; 100% coverage; format, specs, Credo and Dialyzer passed.

checks.name: live restart
checks.summary: Unpublished worktree retained and service healthy.

residualRisk.risk: Per-session bos-mcp Node memory remains duplicated
residualRisk.mitigation: Tracked by bos-mcp#12 with identity-safe cache/proxy acceptance criteria.

residualRisk.risk: Final telemetry aggregation migration is not installed until active workers finish
residualRisk.mitigation: Branch and PR are durable; restart is deliberately deferred to preserve live work.

summary: Recovery hardening, bounded audit storage and cache-aware token telemetry pass local, CI and live restart verification on the exact PR HEAD.
